name: sitechain
description: Agentic website creation — coordinated agents that design and build. Works with Cursor, Claude Code, Gemini CLI, Codex CLI, Copilot, Antigravity, and more.
author: Matias Musha

scripts.clean: rm -rf .claude/skills dist skills && mkdir -p .claude/skills dist skills
scripts.rebuild: npm run clean && npm run build
